sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76672" key="paidofoni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παιδο-φονία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n76672.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">murder of one's children</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.727d</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
